pages.title: Refund Policy
pages.author: ops@acme.com
pages.content:
Refunds within 30 days of purchase are automatically approved.
Refund requests above $500 require manager sign-off.
Never refund an order older than 90 days without manager approval.
Never exceed the original charge amount.
To process a refund:
1. Look up the order by order_id.
2. Verify the purchase date and amount.
3. If eligible, issue the refund via Stripe and update the support ticket.
Escalation: route unresolved cases to the #refund-approvals channel with order, amount, reason, and policy citation.

pages.title: Refund Policy (legacy)
pages.author: ops@acme.com
pages.content: Refund requests above $300 require manager sign-off.
